description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 29, 2025 at 6:23 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck on 14th Street near Valencia Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound in the left lane on 14th Street with its right turn signal activated when the Waymo AV initiated a 
lane change to the right lane. As the Waymo AV crossed the dashed white lane line, the Waymo AV slowed to a stop, partially in the left 
lane and partially in the right lane, to yield to an SUV stopped in a queue of traffic in front of the Waymo AV. A box truck that was initially 
stopped in the right lane behind and to the right of the Waymo AV began to proceed forward. The Waymo AV proceeded forward 
momentarily before stopping as the box truck continued to pass the Waymo AV on the right, and the left side of the box truck made contact 
with the front right side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
